title: The Fastest Way to Install Claude Code on Mac (EASY)
summary: A tutorial video on installing Claude Code on macOS. Claude Code is presented as a powerful AI coding assistant that provides fine-grained privacy controls over file and folder access, with installation taking less than 2 minutes on Mac.
writeup: A concise walkthrough of installing Claude Code on macOS in under two minutes. The video covers account setup at claude.ai, the billing prerequisite (Pro plan at $20/month minimum, with a Max plan option for heavier usage), and the native macOS install via a single terminal command copied from code.claude.com/docs. It ends the moment the Claude Code welcome screen appears, treating the install itself as the complete deliverable.
key_points: Claude Code requires at least the Claude Pro plan ($20/month); the Max plan is available for users who need higher usage limits.
The official installation reference for macOS is at code.claude.com/docs, which provides a native-install script under the macOS section.
Installation is a single terminal command: copy the script from the docs page, paste it into a macOS terminal (opened via Command-Space), and press Enter.
After the script completes, typing 'claude' in the terminal launches Claude Code and displays the welcome screen, confirming a successful install.
